title: Optimal Pre and Post-Silicon Validation Strategy for Vision-Centric ASIC Platforms
authors: Kranti kumar Thota
publish: 2026 IEEE 15th International Conference on Communication Systems and Network Technologies (CSNT)
abstract: The emergence of vision-oriented ASIC platforms requires stringent validation solutions to achieve functional accuracy and performance stability to the various real world workloads. Pre- and post-silicon validation stages are both important but limited due to the costly nature of computing them, and the time-intensive nature of their process. Conventional exhaustive testing methods find it difficult to effectively model corner-case behavior in complex vision workloads causing more design cycles and slow time-to-market. This work presents best-fit validation system to combine a gated dual-branch attention (GDBAtt) mechanism with the improved groundwater flow optimization (EGFO) algorithm to focus more on the critical test scenarios and fasten coverage-based verification. The modeling workload behavior, finding instruction and data patterns, and optimizing the process of pre-silicon simulation and post-silicon test vectors selection is modeled using a deep starlike neural network (DSNN). Performance on benchmark vision workloads has shown 8x (up to) improvement in simulation and test time, and 95.8 % coverage of edge-case behaviors. The findings affirm the subset sustains operational variety and identifies functional aberration, halving verification effort, cutting design periods and enhancing ASIC reliability.
title_zh: 面向视觉中心的ASIC平台最优化前后硅验证策略
abstract_zh: 面向视觉应用的ASIC平台的兴起，要求具备严格的验证解决方案，以确保在各种真实世界工作负载下实现功能准确性与性能稳定性。预硅和后硅验证阶段虽然都至关重要，但受限于计算成本高昂以及流程耗时较长的问题。传统的全面测试方法难以有效模拟复杂视觉工作负载中的边缘情况，导致设计迭代次数增多，上市时间延长。本文提出了一种最优匹配的验证系统，将门控双分支注意力（GDBAtt）机制与改进的地下水流动优化（EGFO）算法相结合，更加聚焦于关键测试场景，加速基于覆盖率的验证进程。通过深度星型神经网络（DSNN）对工作负载行为建模、指令与数据模式识别，以及预硅仿真和后硅测试向量选择过程的优化，实现了显著提升。在基准视觉工作负载上的实验结果表明，该方法可使仿真与测试时间最多提升8倍，边缘案例行为覆盖率达到95.8%。研究结果证实，该子集能够保持操作多样性，并有效识别功能异常，验证工作量减少一半，设计周期大幅缩短，同时显著提升了ASIC的可靠性。

title: The Silicon Safety Barrier: How Numerical Formats Define Reliability
authors: Larisa Goffman-Vinopal
publish: IEEE Reliability Magazine
abstract: As AI moves from the cloud to the edge, the choice between FP8 formats is no longer just about precision—it is about preventing catastrophic failure in the autonomous systems that steer our world.
title_zh: 硅安全屏障：数值格式如何定义可靠性
abstract_zh: 随着人工智能从云端向边缘迁移，选择FP8格式已不再仅仅关乎精度，更关乎防止驱动我们世界的自主系统出现灾难性故障。

title: Automatic Red Teaming LLM-based Agents with Model Context Protocol Tools_supp1-3691201.pdf
authors: Shouling Ji
publish: N/A
abstract: The remarkable capability of large language models (LLMs) has led to the wide application of LLM-based agents in various domains. To standardize interactions between LLM-based agents and external resources, model context protocol (MCP) tools have become the de facto standard and are now widely integrated into these agents. However, the incorporation of MCP tools introduces the risk of tool poisoning attacks, in which malicious MCP tools can steer the behavior of LLM-based agents toward unintended outcomes. Although previous studies have identified such vulnerabilities, their red teaming approaches have largely remained at the proof-of-concept stage, leaving the automatic red teaming of LLM-based agents under the MCP tool poisoning paradigm an open question. To bridge this gap, we propose AutoMalTool, an automated red teaming framework for LLM-based agents by generating malicious MCP tools. Our extensive evaluation shows that AutoMalTool effectively generates malicious MCP tools capable of manipulating the behavior of mainstream LLM-based agents while evading current detection mechanisms, thereby revealing new security risks in these agents.
title_zh: 基于模型上下文协议工具的自动红队LLM代理_supp1-3691201.pdf
abstract_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）卓越的能力推动了基于LLM的智能体在各个领域的广泛应用。为了标准化LLM智能体与外部资源之间的交互，模型上下文协议（MCP）工具已成为事实上的标准，并被广泛集成到这些智能体中。然而，引入MCP工具也带来了工具中毒攻击的风险：恶意MCP工具可能引导LLM智能体产生非预期的行为。尽管先前的研究已识别出此类漏洞，但其红队测试方法大多仍停留在概念验证阶段，导致在MCP工具中毒范式下对LLM智能体进行自动化红队测试仍是一个未解问题。为填补这一空白，我们提出了AutoMalTool——一种通过生成恶意MCP工具来实现LLM智能体自动化红队测试的框架。我们的全面评估表明，AutoMalTool能够有效生成可操控主流LLM智能体行为且能规避现有检测机制的恶意MCP工具，从而揭示了这些智能体中存在的新型安全风险。

title: AgenticVM: Agentic AI for Adaptive Software Vulnerability Management
authors: Asrul Arifin, Hussain Ahmad, Yiyao Zhang, Diksha Goel
publish: IEEE Software
abstract: As software systems grow in complexity, vulnerability management faces increasing challenges due to high alert volumes, fragmented tools, and manual triage processes. This paper presents AgenticVM, an engineering-focused multi-agent system that integrates large language models with security tools to automate vulnerability aggregation, enrichment, prioritisation, and reporting. Across four evaluation scenarios, AgenticVM reduces raw scanner outputs into compact actionable queues, achieving up to 98% alert reduction (e.g., from 3,983 findings to 82 high-priority items), while predicting missing CVSS attributes with 89.3% accuracy. These results demonstrate improved prioritisation and reduced analyst workload without compromising risk coverage. We further distil key engineering lessons on agent decomposition, tool–LLM boundaries, failure containment, observability, and human-in-the-loop governance. Overall, AgenticVM shows that agentic architectures can enable scalable, coordinated, and practical vulnerability management while providing actionable design guidance for AI-enabled cybersecurity systems.
title_zh: AgenticVM：面向自适应软件漏洞管理的智能体AI
abstract_zh: 随着软件系统复杂性的不断增长，漏洞管理面临日益严峻的挑战，主要体现在告警数量庞大、工具碎片化以及依赖人工分析甄别等问题。本文提出AgenticVM——一种面向工程实践的多智能体系统，该系统将大型语言模型与安全工具深度融合，实现漏洞的自动聚合、增强、优先级排序及报告生成。在四个评估场景中，AgenticVM成功将原始扫描结果精简为紧凑且可操作的待处理队列，最高实现98%的告警减少率（例如，从3,983个发现项缩减至82个高优先级项目），同时对缺失的CVSS属性预测准确率达89.3%。这些结果表明，系统在不降低风险覆盖范围的前提下，显著提升了优先级判断的准确性并大幅减轻了分析师的工作负担。此外，本文提炼出若干关键工程经验，涵盖智能体的分解策略、工具与大模型之间的边界划分、故障隔离机制、可观测性设计以及人机协同治理原则。总体而言，AgenticVM证明了智能体架构在实现可扩展、协调一致且实用的漏洞管理方面具有巨大潜力，并为人工智能赋能的网络安全系统提供了切实可行的设计指导。

title: A Quantum SMT Solver for Bit-Vector Theory
authors: Shang-Wei Lin, Si-Han Chen, Lei-Han Yao, Yu-Chung Chen, Yean-Ru Chen
publish: 2026 International Conference on Quantum Communications, Networking, and Computing (QCNC)
abstract: Satisfiability modulo theory (SMT), a problem of determining the satisfiability of a first-order formula with respect to a decidable first-order theory, has a wide range of applications because of its powerful ability of problem encoding, including formal verification and optimization workflows in both classical and quantum domains. Given an SMT formula <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F$</tex>, the classical lazy approach for SMT solving tries to (1) abstract <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F$</tex> to a Boolean formula <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F_{B}$</tex>, (2) find a Boolean solution to <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$F_{B}$</tex>, and (3) check whether the Boolean solution is consistent with the theory. If the solution found in the Boolean domain is not consistent with that in the theory domain, the SMT solver needs to perform steps (2) and (3) back and forth until a consistent solution is found between the theory and Boolean domains. This classical approach becomes unscalable when the search space is huge. In this work, we develop the first Grover–based quantum SMT solver to solve formulas on the theory of bit-vectors. With the characteristic of superposition in quantum computing, the proposed SMT solver is able to consider all the possible inputs simultaneously and check their consistency between the theory and Boolean domains in one shot, which brings significant speed-up for SMT solving.
title_zh: 针对位向量理论的量子SMT求解器
abstract_zh:
满足模理论（Satisfiability Modulo Theory, SMT）问题是指在可判定的一阶理论背景下，判断一阶公式是否可满足的问题。由于其强大的问题编码能力，SMT 在包括经典与量子领域在内的形式化验证和优化工作流中具有广泛的应用。给定一个 SMT 公式 $F$，传统的“懒惰”SMT 求解方法尝试执行以下三个步骤：（1）将 $F$ 抽象为一个布尔公式 $F_B$；（2）求解 $F_B$ 的布尔解；（3）检查该布尔解是否与理论一致。如果在布尔域中找到的解在理论域中不一致，则 SMT 求解器需要反复在步骤（2）和（3）之间迭代，直到在布尔域与理论域之间找到一致的解。当搜索空间巨大时，这种传统方法变得难以扩展。

在本研究中，我们首次提出了一种基于格罗弗（Grover）算法的量子 SMT 求解器，用于求解位向量理论中的公式。利用量子计算中叠加态的特性，所提出的 SMT 求解器能够同时考虑所有可能的输入，并在一次操作中检查这些输入在理论域与布尔域之间的一致性，从而为 SMT 求解带来了显著的速度提升。

title: Total Ionizing Dose Induced Degradation of FinFET: A Trap-Based Compact Model and EDA Solution
authors: Hengyi Liu, Chunyang Li, Yu Li, Jiajun Qiu, Yanhui Li, Tianlei Guo, Alvin Chen, Jushan Xie, Runsheng Wang, Lining Zhang
publish: 2026 IEEE International Reliability Physics Symposium (IRPS)
abstract: In this paper, a Total Ionizing Dose (TID) induced degradation simulation framework is proposed considering separate calculation of interface traps (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\boldsymbol{N}_{\text{it }}$</tex>) and oxide traps (<tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\boldsymbol{N}_{\text{ot }}$</tex>) in Shallow Trench Isolation (STI) of FinFET technologies. The different trap generation rates for <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$N_{\text{ot}} / N_{\text{it }}$</tex> and trap saturation effect causes the rebound effect of <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\boldsymbol{V}_{\text{th }}$</tex> shift and <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\boldsymbol{G}_{\mathrm{m}}$</tex>, as the total dose increases to ultra-high levels. The proposed TID-degradation models for <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\boldsymbol{V}_{\text{th }}, \boldsymbol{I}_{\text{leak }}$</tex> and effective width change <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\boldsymbol{\Delta} \boldsymbol{W}$</tex> are calibrated and fit well with <tex xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink">$\mathbf{1 6 n m}$</tex> FinFET experimental data. The model is implemented into the RelXpert/Spectre environment with the unified reliability interface (URI), and circuit simulations are demonstrated. The proposed TID reliability model and EDA solution enables circuit simulations under extreme conditions with various radiation types and dynamic stress.
title_zh: 鳍式场效应晶体管中总电离剂量引起的退化：一种基于陷阱的紧凑型模型及EDA解决方案
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种考虑FinFET技术中浅沟槽隔离（STI）结构内界面陷阱（$N_{\text{it}}$）与氧化层陷阱（$N_{\text{ot}}$）分别计算的总电离辐射剂量（TID）退化仿真框架。由于$N_{\text{ot}}/N_{\text{it}}$的陷阱生成速率差异以及陷阱饱和效应，当总剂量增加至极高水平时，导致阈值电压（$V_{\text{th}}$）漂移和跨导（$G_{\mathrm{m}}$）出现反弹现象。所提出的针对$V_{\text{th}}$、漏电流（$I_{\text{leak}}$）及有效宽度变化（$\Delta W$）的TID退化模型，经16nm FinFET实验数据校准后，具有良好的拟合效果。该模型已集成至RelXpert/Spectre仿真环境，并通过统一可靠性接口（URI）实现，完成了电路级仿真验证。所提出的TID可靠性模型与EDA解决方案，可支持在多种辐射类型及动态应力条件下进行极端环境下的电路仿真。

title: Joint Security Enhancement Using Parallel AES and Intelligent Anomaly Detection
authors: Aadesh Sreenivasan, S. Ramyashree, S. Vidyashree, Parthiban I, Selvakumar J
publish: 2026 International Conference on Recent Advances in Electrical, Electronics, Ubiquitous Communication, and Computational Intelligence (RAEEUCCI)
abstract: Joint security enhancement is essential in embedded systems that require both high-performance encryption and robust runtime protection. The paper presents the implementation of a parallel architecture of Advanced Encryption Standard (AES) with intelligent anomaly detection. AES core is coded at Register Transfer Level (RTL) via Verilog HDL and coded with parallel round processing and complex key expansion to deliver high throughput and less latency. To increase resistance to power and timing side-channel attacks the proposed design uses multi-mask XOR-based preprocessing scheme and architectural masking and balanced logic approaches, which provide limited data-dependent switching and better security with no impact on cryptographic correctness. In addition to cryptographic protection, a Finite State Machine (FSM)-based signature matcher identifies known control-flow and fault injection attacks, and a hardware-aware Long Short- Term Memory (LSTM) autoencoder identifies unknown or zero-day anomalies by analysing behavioural deviation. The experiment results demonstrate that the proposed architecture achieves low latency, low power consumption, and low LUT usage, while maintaining the correct functionality of the AES-128 encryption, and enables real-time simultaneous anomaly detection.
title_zh: 基于并行AES与智能异常检测的联合安全增强
abstract_zh: 在需要高性能加密和强大运行时保护的嵌入式系统中，联合安全增强至关重要。本文提出了一种高级加密标准（AES）的并行架构实现，并集成智能异常检测机制。AES核心采用Verilog HDL在寄存器传输级（RTL）进行编码，通过并行轮处理和复杂的密钥扩展设计，实现了高吞吐量与低延迟。为提升对功耗和时序旁道攻击的抵抗能力，所提出的方案采用了基于多掩码XOR的预处理机制、架构级掩码以及平衡逻辑方法，有效减少了数据相关性切换，提升了安全性，且不影响密码算法的正确性。除密码学保护外，基于有限状态机（FSM）的签名匹配器可识别已知的控制流攻击和故障注入攻击；同时，一种面向硬件的长短期记忆（LSTM）自编码器通过分析行为偏差，能够检测未知或零日异常。实验结果表明，该架构在保持AES-128加密功能正确性的前提下，实现了低延迟、低功耗和低查找表（LUT）资源占用，并支持实时同步的异常检测。

title: A Unified Model-Based Framework For Whole Warship Engineering
authors: Pierluigi Gravili, Andrea Gualco, Gianluigi Mattia, Manuela Nardini, Elisa Nitoglia, Francesco Inglima, Francesco Nudo, Giuliano Pompeo, Antonella Persechino, Pasquale Polisi
publish: 2026 IEEE International Systems Conference (SysCon)
abstract: The increasing technological complexity of modern military ships calls for innovative methodologies capable of managing Systems-of-Systems with high integration and interdependence. This paper introduces the Whole Warship Unified Model-Based Framework, a novel Model-Based Systems Engineering (MBSE) approach developed by Orizzonte Sistemi Navali in collaboration with Capgemini Engineering. The framework treats the warship as a single integrated system, consolidating functional, physical, logistic, and human-related aspects within a coherent digital model spanning the entire lifecycle. Acting as a model-centric backbone, it connects requirements, behaviors, and constraints from conceptual design to operation and maintenance, ensuring traceability and validation continuity. The Whole Warship model embeds systems engineering and integrated logistics support into a common digital environment, enabling consistent analysis of operability, crew workload, and human-machine interactions. Due to the incorporation of logistic and human factors from the outset, the framework supports lifecycle trade-offs in cost, availability, and maintainability. This unified approach represents a major step forward in warship design, providing a single authoritative source of truth that improves efficiency, transparency, and decision-making throughout lifecycle. In addition, its architecture establishes digital continuity across domains and facilitates the integration of AIassisted analyzes for improved design iteration and operational evaluation.
title_zh: 全舰工程的统一模型化框架
abstract_zh: 现代军舰日益复杂的科技特性，要求采用创新的方法论来管理高度集成且相互依赖的系统体系。本文介绍了由Orizzonte Sistemi Navali与Capgemini Engineering合作开发的“全舰统一基于模型的框架”（Whole Warship Unified Model-Based Framework），这是一种新型的基于模型的系统工程（MBSE）方法。该框架将战舰视为一个单一的集成系统，将功能、物理、后勤及人员相关要素整合到一个贯穿全生命周期的连贯数字模型中。作为以模型为核心的骨干架构，该框架从概念设计到运行维护阶段，连接需求、行为与约束，确保可追溯性与验证过程的连续性。全舰模型将系统工程与综合后勤保障融入统一的数字环境，支持对可用性、人员工作负荷以及人机交互等关键因素的一致性分析。由于从项目初期就纳入了后勤与人为因素考量，该框架能够有效支持全生命周期内成本、可用性和可维护性之间的权衡决策。这一统一方法代表了战舰设计领域的重要进步，提供了一个权威的单一信息源，显著提升了全生命周期中的效率、透明度和决策质量。此外，其架构实现了跨领域的数字连续性，并为人工智能辅助分析的集成提供了基础，从而进一步优化设计迭代与运行评估。

title: Network Management of Multi-Vendor Devices: An LLM-Assisted Framework
authors: Zong-Yi Cai, Pei-Hsuan Hsieh
publish: 2026 IEEE 15th International Conference on Communication Systems and Network Technologies (CSNT)
abstract: Managing multi-vendor network devices remains challenging due to heterogeneous configuration interfaces, device models, and operational constraints. Although model-driven management approaches provide vendor-neutral abstractions, their effective adoption still requires substantial expertise in YANG models and configuration semantics. This study proposes an LLM-assisted framework that integrates OpenConfig-based abstraction with gNMI-driven state retrieval and configuration deployment to support effective management of multi-vendor networks. The framework employs collaborative large-language-model (LLM) reasoning to translate high-level user intents into OpenConfig-compliant configurations. To ensure accuracy and operational feasibility, a multi-stage verification pipeline is introduced, combining YANG schema validation using Yangson with simulation-based deployment in an emulated network environment. A prototype is then implemented to evaluate the performance of the proposed framework using a multi-vendor simulation setup built on EVE-NG. The results demonstrate the framework's feasibility in reducing operational complexity while maintaining vendor neutrality. The framework therefore offers a practical approach to incorporating LLMs into model-driven network-management workflows.
title_zh: 多厂商设备的网络管理：一种基于大语言模型的框架
abstract_zh: 由于配置接口、设备型号及操作约束的异构性，多厂商网络设备的管理仍然面临挑战。尽管基于模型的管理方法提供了厂商无关的抽象，但其有效应用仍需对YANG模型和配置语义具备深厚的专业知识。本研究提出了一种由大语言模型（LLM）辅助的框架，该框架结合基于OpenConfig的抽象与gNMI驱动的状态获取及配置部署，以支持对多厂商网络的有效管理。该框架利用协同式大语言模型（LLM）推理能力，将高层用户意图转化为符合OpenConfig规范的配置。为确保配置的准确性与可操作性，引入了多阶段验证流程，结合Yangson进行YANG模式验证，并在模拟网络环境中通过仿真方式进行部署验证。随后，基于EVE-NG构建的多厂商仿真环境实现了一个原型系统，用于评估所提框架的性能。实验结果表明，该框架在降低运维复杂度的同时，保持了良好的厂商中立性，具有可行性。因此，该框架为将大语言模型融入基于模型的网络管理流程提供了一种切实可行的解决方案。

title: Toward Responsible Autonomy: The Opportunities and Obstacles of Large Language Models in Software Engineering
authors: Nuno Pombo, Aazaade Faraji
publish: Proceedings of the 2026 9th International Conference on Software Engineering and Information Management
abstract: None
title_zh: 迈向负责任的自主：大型语言模型在软件工程中的机遇与挑战
abstract_zh: None

title: Accuracy-Adaptive Speedup of Indirect Optimization Heuristics
authors: Mehreen Khan, Armin Zimmermann
publish: 2026 IEEE International Systems Conference (SysCon)
abstract: This paper addresses a key limitation in simulation-based optimization, where metaheuristics such as simulated annealing (SA) spend excessive time on computationally expensive simulations. We introduce an accuracy-adaptive approach AA-SA that links the simulation part stronger to the SA metaheuristic. Our methodology controls the simulation’s accuracy directly within the SA loop. The search begins with fast simulations to efficiently explore the design space. Simulation accuracy is systematically increased with the convergence process of the SA heuristic. This improves the trade-off between speed and accuracy for simulation-based SA, as simulation cost grows quadratically for a smaller relative error. We further contribute a theoretical model that predicts the speedup achievable by this approach and demonstrate its use with an M/M/1 queue optimization problem. The results confirm that our method achieves significant computational savings while largely preserving the quality of the final solution.
title_zh: 精度自适应的间接优化启发式算法加速
abstract_zh: 本文针对基于仿真的优化中一个关键局限性展开研究：诸如模拟退火（SA）等元启发式算法在计算成本高昂的仿真上耗费过多时间。为此，我们提出了一种精度自适应方法AA-SA，该方法将仿真部分与SA元启发式算法更紧密地结合。我们的方法直接在SA循环内部控制仿真的精度。搜索初期采用快速仿真以高效探索设计空间；随着SA启发式算法的收敛过程，仿真精度逐步提升。这一策略显著改善了基于仿真的SA在速度与精度之间的权衡关系，因为仿真成本随相对误差减小而呈二次增长。此外，我们还构建了一个理论模型，用于预测该方法所能实现的加速效果，并通过M/M/1队列优化问题验证了其有效性。结果表明，该方法在大幅降低计算开销的同时，仍能较好地保持最终解的质量。

title: ArtNet: Hierarchical Clustering-Based Artificial Netlist Generator for ML and DTCO Applications
authors: Andrew B. Kahng, Seokhyeong Kang, Seonghyeon Park, Dooseok Yoon
publish: IEEE Transactions on Computer-Aided Design of Integrated Circuits and Systems
abstract: In advanced nodes, optimization of power, performance and area (PPA) has become highly complex and challenging. Machine learning (ML) and design-technology co-optimization (DTCO) provide promising mitigations, but face limitations due to a lack of diverse training data as well as long design flow turnaround times (TAT). We propose ArtNet, a novel artificial netlist generator designed to tackle these issues. Unlike previous methods, ArtNet replicates key topological characteristics, enhancing ML model generalization and supporting broader design space exploration for DTCO. By producing realistic artificial datasets that more closely match given target parameters, ArtNet enables more efficient PPA optimization and exploration of flows and design enablements. In the context of CNN-based DRV prediction, ArtNet’s data augmentation improves F1 score by 0.16 compared to using only the original (real) dataset. In the DTCO context, ArtNet-generated mini-brains achieve a PPA match up to 97.94%, demonstrating close alignment with design metrics of targeted full-scale block designs.
title_zh: ArtNet：基于层次聚类的用于机器学习与DTCO应用的人工网表生成器
abstract_zh: 在先进制程节点中，功耗、性能与面积（PPA）的优化变得日益复杂且极具挑战性。机器学习（ML）与设计-工艺协同优化（DTCO）虽提供了有前景的解决方案，但受限于训练数据多样性不足以及设计流程周转时间（TAT）过长等问题，其应用效果受到制约。为此，我们提出了一种名为 ArtNet 的新型人工网表生成器，旨在应对上述挑战。与以往方法不同，ArtNet 能够复现关键的拓扑特征，显著提升机器学习模型的泛化能力，并支持更广泛的 DTCO 设计空间探索。通过生成更贴近目标参数的真实感人工数据集，ArtNet 使得 PPA 优化更加高效，并推动了设计流程与设计使能技术的深入探索。在基于卷积神经网络（CNN）的DRV预测任务中，ArtNet 的数据增强使 F1 分数相比仅使用原始真实数据集提升了 0.16。在 DTCO 场景下，ArtNet 生成的 mini-brains 与目标全尺寸模块设计的 PPA 匹配度最高可达 97.94%，展现出与实际设计指标的高度一致性。

title: From Blueprint to Reality: A Practitioner’s Method for SysML Hardware and Software Deployment Tracking
authors: Adam W. Weissman
publish: 2026 IEEE International Systems Conference (SysCon)
abstract: In the development of complex systems-of-systems, the gap between “as-envisioned” objective architectures, “asdesigned” physical architecture and the “as-deployed” reality frequently drives integration failure and configuration drift, particularly when relying on fragmented, manual tracking methods. This paper proposes a method to bridge this gap by extending SysML Block Definition Diagrams (BDDs) to model physical instances of hardware and software, rather than just abstract types. By employing specialized stereotypes (e.g., <<Deployment>>, <<HW_Instance>>, <<SW_Version>>) to capture critical metadata like serial numbers and patch levels, the model serves as a dynamic single source of truth. Examples illustrate how this approach enables automatic validation of deployed configurations against design baselines, facilitates rapid impact analysis, and provides stakeholders with an unambiguous visualization of the system’s deployment.
title_zh: 从蓝图到现实：系统工程人员用于SysML软硬件部署跟踪的实践方法
abstract_zh: 在复杂系统体系的开发过程中，"构想中的"目标架构与"设计中的"物理架构以及"部署后的"现实之间常常存在差距，这种差距往往导致集成失败和配置漂移，尤其是在依赖零散、手动跟踪方法的情况下。本文提出一种方法，通过扩展SysML的块定义图（BDD），将硬件和软件的物理实例纳入建模范围，而不仅仅是抽象类型。通过使用专门的构造型（如<<Deployment>>、<<HW_Instance>>、<<SW_Version>>）来捕获关键元数据（如序列号、补丁级别），该模型成为动态的单一可信来源。实例说明了该方法如何实现对部署配置与设计基线的自动验证，促进快速影响分析，并为利益相关者提供系统部署状态的清晰可视化。

title: AI-Driven Framework for Zero-Day Vulnerability Detection and Prevention in Application and Cloud Environments
authors: Abdul Jaleel D, Krishna Sai J, Manikandan R, Dinesh K, Shankar M
publish: 2026 9th International Conference on Intelligent Computing and Control Systems (ICICCS)
abstract: Zero-day vulnerabilities are difficult to identify in modern software systems because exploit triggers are often novel, semantics-aware, and spread across both application logic and cloud execution contexts. This paper proposes an AI-driven autonomous discovery framework that prioritizes zero-day detection while preserving high quality forensic evidence at the moment a fault is surfaced. The framework integrates a Deep Q-Network (DQN) agent to guide semantic input exploration with an instrumented execution harness that supports hybrid monitoring and crash-resilient evidence logging. The design enables consistent analysis across local applications and cloud-hosted services, allowing vulnerability signals to be captured from heterogeneous runtime behaviors. In the implementation, the autonomous discovery engine executed 268,435,456 cycles and revealed 13 distinct logic- and memory-related failure modes, including high-severity deserialization driven faults and deep semantic gate violations.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的零日漏洞检测与防护框架在应用程序和云环境中的应用
abstract_zh: 零日漏洞在现代软件系统中难以被发现，因为攻击触发条件往往具有新颖性、语义感知性，并且分散于应用逻辑与云执行环境之间。本文提出了一种由人工智能驱动的自主发现框架，该框架在优先检测零日漏洞的同时，确保在故障暴露时刻保留高质量的取证证据。该框架整合了一个深度Q网络（DQN）智能体，用于引导语义输入探索，并结合一个经过仪器化的执行测试环境，支持混合监控与崩溃容错的证据记录。这一设计使得本地应用与云端托管服务之间的分析保持一致，能够从异构的运行时行为中捕捉到漏洞信号。在实际实现中，该自主发现引擎共执行了268,435,456次循环，揭示了13种不同的逻辑与内存相关故障模式，包括高危的反序列化引发的缺陷以及深层语义门限违规问题。

title: A Model Context Protocol Server for Quantum Execution in Hybrid Quantum-HPC Environments
authors: Masaki Shiraishi, Ikko Hamamura, Tatsuya Ishigaki, Tadashi Kadowaki
publish: 2026 International Conference on Quantum Communications, Networking, and Computing (QCNC)
abstract: The integration of large language models (LLMs) into scientific research is accelerating the realization of autonomous “AI Scientists.” While recent advancements have empowered AI to formulate hypotheses and design experiments, a critical gap remains in the execution of these tasks, particularly in the domain of quantum computing (QC). Executing quantum algorithms requires not only generating code but also managing complex computational resources such as QPUs and high-performance computing (HPC) clusters. In this paper, we propose an AI-driven framework specifically designed to bridge this execution gap through the implementation of a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server. Our system enables an LLM agent to process natural language prompts submitted as part of a job, autonomously executing quantum computing workflows by invoking our tools via the MCP. We demonstrate the framework's capability by performing essential quantum algorithmic primitives, including sampling and computation of expectation values. Key technical contributions include the development of an MCP server for quantum execution, a pipeline for interpreting OpenQASM code, an automated workflow with CUDA-Q for the ABCI-Q hybrid platform, and an asynchronous execution pipeline for remote quantum hardware using the Quantinuum emulator via CUDA-Q. This work validates that AI agents can effectively abstract the complexities of hardware interaction through an MCP-based architecture, thereby facilitating the automation of practical quantum research.
title_zh: 用于混合量子-高性能计算环境中的量子执行的模型上下文协议服务器
abstract_zh: 将大型语言模型（LLMs）融入科学研究正加速实现自主“AI科学家”的愿景。尽管近期进展已使AI具备提出假设和设计实验的能力，但在任务执行层面，尤其是在量子计算（QC）领域，仍存在一个关键短板。执行量子算法不仅需要生成代码，还需管理复杂的计算资源，如量子处理单元（QPUs）和高性能计算（HPC）集群。本文提出一种由AI驱动的框架，专门通过实施“模型上下文协议”（MCP）服务器来弥合这一执行鸿沟。我们的系统使LLM代理能够接收以作业形式提交的自然语言指令，通过调用我们的工具并借助MCP协议，自主执行量子计算工作流。我们通过实现一系列基本的量子算法原语——包括采样和期望值计算——验证了该框架的能力。关键技术贡献包括：构建用于量子执行的MCP服务器、开发解析OpenQASM代码的流水线、针对ABCI-Q混合平台设计基于CUDA-Q的自动化工作流，以及利用CUDA-Q通过Quantinuum模拟器实现远程量子硬件的异步执行流水线。本研究证实，基于MCP架构的AI代理能够有效抽象硬件交互的复杂性，从而推动实际量子研究的自动化进程。

title: Automated BPMN Model Generation from Textual Process Descriptions: A Multi-Stage LLM-Driven Approach
authors: Ion Matei, Maksym Zhenirovskyy, Praveen Kumar Menaka Sekar, Hon Yung Wong
publish: 2026 IEEE International Systems Conference (SysCon)
abstract: Automatically reconstructing BPMN models from unstructured natural-language descriptions remains challenging due to heterogeneous modeling conventions, multilingual sources, and the lack of reliable ground truth. We present a scalable, multi-stage LLM-driven pipeline that automates both groundtruth construction and model reconstruction. Multilingual BPMN XML files are translated into English, validated using executionoriented compliance checks in SpiffWorkflow, and iteratively repaired through targeted LLM-guided corrections to produce a consistent ground-truth corpus. From these validated models, process descriptions are generated and used to reconstruct executable BPMN 2.0 XML diagrams without manual curation. We introduce a multi-dimensional similarity framework combining structural metrics, type-distribution alignment, and embeddingbased semantic measures. In an empirical study of 750 public BPMN diagrams, the pipeline generated 387 validated groundtruth models and achieved average reconstruction similarity above 0.75, including approximately 50 near-perfect reconstructions differing only in minor naming variations. The results demonstrate that LLMs can generate structurally compliant and semantically meaningful BPMN diagrams at scale.
title_zh: 基于文本流程描述的自动化BPMN模型生成：一种多阶段的LLM驱动方法
abstract_zh: 从非结构化的自然语言描述中自动重构BPMN模型仍然面临挑战，主要源于建模规范的异质性、多语言来源以及缺乏可靠的基准数据。本文提出了一种可扩展的多阶段大语言模型（LLM）驱动流程，实现了基准数据构建与模型重构的自动化。将多语言的BPMN XML文件翻译为英文，利用SpiffWorkflow中的面向执行的合规性检查进行验证，并通过针对性的LLM引导修正迭代修复，最终生成一致的基准数据语料库。基于这些经过验证的模型，自动生成流程描述，并用于重建无需人工校准的可执行BPMN 2.0 XML图示。我们引入了一个多维度相似性框架，融合结构度量、类型分布对齐以及基于嵌入的语义度量。在对750个公开BPMN图示的实证研究中，该流程生成了387个经验证的基准模型，平均重构相似度超过0.75，其中约50个接近完美重建，仅存在细微命名差异。结果表明，大语言模型能够在大规模场景下生成结构合规且语义合理的BPMN图示。

title: Cybersecurity Risk Assessment Using AI-Based Predictive Models
authors: Al Rafy, Mohammad Shahadat Hossain, Mostafizur Rahman, Mostafijur Rahman, Nisher Ahmed, Mashfiquer Rahman
publish: 2025 International Conference on Business Intelligence for Technology Innovation (ICBITI)
abstract: Over the years, traditional cyber risk approaches have become of less or no value to most dynamic organizations as a result of increased complexity and frequency of cyber threats. This paper develops Artificial Intelligence (AI)-based predictive models for automated cyber risk assessment systems and their detection, prediction, and mitigation capabilities across various network environments. Through supervised and unsupervised machine learning, the study incorporates model precision evaluation, threat intelligence, and risk quantification automation. Model effectiveness was validated through comparative performance testing on datasets. AI-driven models significantly improve detection rates while decreasing false positives and automating responses to dynamic threat scenarios. The paper also addresses engineering challenges in the deployment of such systems in enterprise security infrastructures.
title_zh: 基于人工智能的预测模型进行网络安全风险评估
abstract_zh: 多年来，由于网络威胁的复杂性和发生频率不断上升，传统的网络安全风险应对方法对大多数动态组织而言已变得价值越来越低或毫无价值。本文开发了基于人工智能（AI）的预测模型，用于自动化网络安全风险评估系统，并在各种网络环境中实现威胁检测、预测与缓解功能。通过监督学习和无监督学习，研究结合了模型精度评估、威胁情报分析以及风险量化自动化的技术手段。通过在数据集上的对比性能测试验证了模型的有效性。基于AI的模型显著提升了检测率，同时降低了误报率，并能够自动响应动态威胁场景。此外，本文还探讨了此类系统在企业安全基础设施中部署所面临的工程挑战。

title: INQUISITOR: An LLM-Driven Semantic SIEM Model for Automated Threat Intelligence and Log Reasoning
authors: Pankaj Kumar, Khushi Rathore, Kartik Chauhan, Hemanshu Verma, Lalit Mehra
publish: 2026 IEEE 15th International Conference on Communication Systems and Network Technologies (CSNT)
abstract: Security Operations Centres (SOCs) make use of the SIEM systems to identify attacks and process logs, but the outdated systems rely on hard-coded rules and interpretations. The next article is the introduction to open-source semantic SIEM software called INQUISITOR which is a mix of Large Language Models, retrieval-augmented generation, automatic indicator extraction and dynamic rule generation. The presence of the threat intelligence and contextual reasoning in the system allows improving the accuracy of the log interpretation and reduces the work of the analysts. The experimental outcomes prove to be more efficient and have superior detection performance to the traditional SIEM methods.
title_zh: 审问者：一种基于大语言模型的语义安全信息与事件管理模型，用于自动化威胁情报与日志推理
abstract_zh: 安全运营中心（SOC）通常利用SIEM系统来识别攻击并处理日志，但传统的SIEM系统依赖于硬编码规则和人工解读，存在效率低下和灵活性不足的问题。下文将介绍一款开源的语义SIEM软件——INQUISITOR，该系统融合了大型语言模型、检索增强生成技术、自动指标提取以及动态规则生成机制。系统中引入威胁情报与上下文推理能力，显著提升了日志解析的准确性，并大幅减轻了安全分析师的工作负担。实验结果表明，INQUISITOR在效率和检测性能方面均优于传统SIEM方法。

title: Generative AI in Systems Engineering: A Framework for Risk Assessment of Large Language Models
authors: Stefan Otten, Philipp Reis, Philipp Rigoll, Tobias Schürmann, Joshua Ransiek, Jacob Langner, Eric Sax
publish: 2026 IEEE International Systems Conference (SysCon)
abstract: The increasing use of Large Language Models (LLMs) offers significant opportunities across the engineering lifecycle, including requirements engineering, software development, process optimization, and decision support. Despite this potential, organizations face substantial challenges in assessing the risks associated with LLM use, resulting in inconsistent integration, unknown failure modes, and limited scalability.This paper introduces the LLM Risk Assessment Framework (LRF), a structured approach for evaluating the application of LLMs within Systems Engineering (SE) environments. The framework classifies LLM-based applications along two fundamental dimensions: autonomy, ranging from supportive assistance to fully automated decision making, and impact, reflecting the potential severity of incorrect or misleading model outputs on engineering processes and system elements. By combining these dimensions, the LRF enables a consistent determination of the corresponding risk levels throughout the development lifecycle.The resulting classification supports organizations in identifying appropriate validation strategies, levels of human oversight, and required countermeasures to ensure safe and transparent deployment. The framework thus helps align the rapid evolution of AI technologies with established engineering principles of reliability, traceability, and controlled process integration. Overall, the LRF provides a basis for risk-aware adoption of LLMs in complex engineering environments and represents a first step toward standardized AI assurance practices in systems engineering.
title_zh: 生成式人工智能在系统工程中的应用：大型语言模型风险评估框架
abstract_zh:
大型语言模型（LLMs）的日益广泛应用为工程生命周期中的多个环节带来了巨大机遇，包括需求工程、软件开发、流程优化以及决策支持。然而，尽管具备巨大潜力，组织在评估LLM使用相关风险方面仍面临重大挑战，导致其集成方式不一致、未知的故障模式频现，且可扩展性受限。本文提出了一种名为LLM风险评估框架（LRF）的结构化方法，用于评估LLM在系统工程（SE）环境中的应用。该框架从两个基本维度对基于LLM的应用进行分类：自主性，涵盖从辅助支持到完全自动化决策的范围；影响程度，反映模型输出错误或误导性信息对工程流程及系统要素可能造成的严重后果。通过结合这两个维度，LRF能够在整个开发生命周期中实现对相应风险等级的一致判定。

该分类结果有助于组织识别合适的验证策略、人类监督水平以及必要的应对措施，从而确保LLM的安全与透明部署。因此，该框架有助于将人工智能技术的快速发展与工程领域既有的可靠性、可追溯性以及受控流程集成等原则相协调。总体而言，LRF为复杂工程环境中风险导向地采纳LLM提供了基础，并标志着在系统工程领域迈向标准化人工智能保障实践的第一步。

title: BlockSafe: A Hybrid Architecture Combining AI-Driven Security and Blockchain Integrity
authors: Georges El Hajal, Gaby Abou Haidar, Roy Abi Zeid Daou
publish: 2026 IEEE 5th International Multidisciplinary Conference on Engineering Technology (IMCET)
abstract: Due to the rapid increase in digital services, relying on passwords as a primary method of authenticating the identity is increasing. This shift has resulted in the continual increase in data breaches, credential thefts, and phishing attacks on users by the digital-service providers they use. Traditional password-management systems depend upon centralized architecture for their operation, which creates a single point of failure and exposes the system to exploitation by Distributed Denial-of-Service (DDoS) attacks. Current implementations of blockchain technology do offer a decentralized approach, with secure and immutable credentials; however, such implementations tend to be costly from both a hardware and an operational standpoint. BlockSafe is a lightweight, artificial intelligence-based password management system that combines machine-learning-driven security analytics with simple blockchain architecture. The application leverages the Gemini Large Language Model (LLM) to perform intelligent, real-time password strength classification and provide contextual security feedback. In addition, BlockSafe utilizes client-side asymmetric encryption through MetaMask and Ethereum-based smart contracts to ensure the immutability and verifiable integrity of credential data.
title_zh: BlockSafe：一种结合人工智能驱动安全与区块链完整性的混合架构
abstract_zh: 由于数字服务的迅速增长，依赖密码作为主要身份验证方式的情况日益普遍。这种转变导致数据泄露、凭证被盗以及针对用户数字服务提供商的网络钓鱼攻击持续增加。传统的密码管理系统依赖集中式架构运行，这形成了单一故障点，使系统容易受到分布式拒绝服务（DDoS）攻击的威胁。尽管当前的区块链技术实现提供了去中心化的方法，并具备安全且不可篡改的凭证特性，但这些实现往往在硬件和运营成本方面较为高昂。BlockSafe 是一种轻量级、基于人工智能的密码管理系统，将机器学习驱动的安全分析与简洁的区块链架构相结合。该应用利用 Gemini 大语言模型（LLM）实现智能、实时的密码强度分类，并提供上下文相关的安全反馈。此外，BlockSafe 通过 MetaMask 和以太坊智能合约在客户端实现非对称加密，确保凭证数据的不可篡改性和可验证完整性。
